title: The National Transportation Center & the SMARTER Center — D-RED Seminar Slides (Jeihani)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2025-11-12 Monthly D-RED Seminar on Morgan's National Transportation Center (NTC) and SMARTER Center, presented by Mansoureh Jeihani, PhD. Companion deck (same session) is form_dred_2025_11_chavis_transportation. Joint session with Di Yang, PhD and Celeste Chavis, PhD on MSU's transportation research portfolio.
